text: The meeting room is empty, filled with the cold glow of artificial light, glass barriers creating both transparency and separation. I feel a sense of anticipation and possibility—spaces like this vibrate with the latent energy of ideas yet to be exchanged. Moving on to the R+D wall, I am absorbed by the celebration of human inquiry and innovation. The bold colors and statements evoke excitement and remind me that progress is both collective and creative. I feel inspired, but also aware of the subtle tension between sterile order and vibrant curiosity that permeates these halls.
